approval_path_matrix_rows.text:
Class: C
Tier: T1
Approval Path: FAST_TRACK
IT Security Review: Notification only
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Manager+
Fast-Track Eligible?: ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: No DPA required. Standard NDA / confidentiality provisions apply. IT Security notification for any system integration, even if non-regulated.

Class: E
Tier: T1
Approval Path: FAST_TRACK
IT Security Review: Not required
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Manager+
Fast-Track Eligible?: ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Standard NDA / confidentiality provisions apply. No system access; no data handling review required.

Class: C
Tier: T2
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Director+
Fast-Track Eligible?: CONDITIONAL
Required Approvals / Notes: No DPA required unless personal data is inadvertently in scope — confirm at intake. Standard NDA applies.

Class: E
Tier: T2
Approval Path: FAST_TRACK
IT Security Review: Not required
Legal / DPA Review: Not required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Director+
Fast-Track Eligible?: ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Standard NDA applies. Procurement confirms no system access and no regulated data in scope before streamlined path is confirmed.

Class: A
Tier: T1
Approval Path: STANDARD
IT Security Review: Required
Legal / DPA Review: Required
Procurement Review: Required
Business Owner Sign-off: Director+
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: CISO awareness notification required. DPA executed before implementation begins.

Class: A
Tier: T4
Approval Path: EXECUTIVE APPROVAL
IT Security Review: Required + CISO Sign-off
Legal / DPA Review: Required + GC Sign-off
Procurement Review: Required + CPO Sign-off
Business Owner Sign-off: EVP + CFO
Fast-Track Eligible?: NOT ELIGIBLE
Required Approvals / Notes: Full executive approval package required. Board notification if vendor will have persistent production system access. DPA required. Legal contract review mandatory.

slack_procurement_chunks.text:
channel: #optichain-review-notes
M. Osei [2024-03-05T15:15:00Z]: Posting the notes from today's OptiChain review kickoff (30 min call, attendees: P. Horak, D. Achterberg, R. Lim, M. Osei): Status: Questionnaire received, review complete. No blocking items identified. Summary: ERP integration — confirmed Tier 3 / export-only per ISP-001 §12.2. No architecture documentation required. Data classification — UNREGULATED. No regulated data, no personal data, no EU employee data in scope. DPA — not required. No DPA trigger rows apply. NDA — fully executed January 15, 2024. Prior relationship — PRQ-2023-0031 closed cleanly Q3 2023. Vendor class — Class C (non-regulated software). Contract value — $45K TCV / T1. Approval path — FAST_TRACK eligible. Next steps: D. Achterberg to issue formal Tier 3 sign-off to Procurement by EOD. M. Osei to issue Procurement Classification Memo. Manager-level sign-off to close the run.
D. Achterberg [2024-03-05T15:27:00Z]: Formal Tier 3 confirmation sent to @M. Osei — documented in the onboarding record. No security follow-up items.
R. Lim [2024-03-05T15:33:00Z]: Legal confirmation issued — no DPA required, NDA confirmed, no legal blockers. Fast-track path is clear from our side.
M. Osei [2024-03-05T15:40:00Z]: Classification memo drafted and being routed for Manager sign-off. Logging overall onboarding status as COMPLETE pending final Manager approval. Fastest run we've had in a while.
P. Horak [2024-03-05T15:55:00Z]: Great work everyone. I'll get the Manager sign-off from Operations by end of week. Once that's confirmed we can notify OptiChain and kick off onboarding. Good example of the process working the way it's supposed to.
